summary: Admin Analytics Dashboard Phase 3 testing completed. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All 14 frontend UI tests passed. Analytics Dashboard displays: overview cards (Total Hours: 16, Total Shifts: 7, Active BnBs: 2, Active Workers: 1), Daily Hours trend chart, Hours by Category pie chart, Performance by BnB bar chart, Top Workers leaderboard, and Inventory Health Issues chart. Role-based access control verified - deployer cannot access analytics.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 analytics endpoints correctly return expected data structures
Role-based access control working - admin/supervisor can access, deployer gets 403
Date range selector works with 7/14/30/90 day presets plus custom dates
Charts use recharts library correctly - AreaChart, PieChart, BarChart all rendering
Inventory Health Issues chart correctly parses notes from end_shift events
Top Workers leaderboard ranks workers by total hours with shift counts
Category Summary displays at bottom with color-coded categories

test_credentials.Deployer: John Deployer / password123 (should NOT see analytics link)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data with additional end_shift events created during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Admin Analytics Dashboard fully tested. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_analytics.py cover: authentication for all user types, role-based access control (admin/supervisor allowed, deployer denied), all 6 analytics endpoints (/admin/analytics/overview, daily-hours, bnb-performance, category-breakdown, worker-performance, inventory-health). Frontend verified: navigation link visibility by role, Analytics Dashboard page load, all 4 overview cards, all 5 chart sections (Daily Hours, Category Breakdown, BnB Performance, Top Workers, Inventory Health), date range selector with 4 presets. Current data: 16 total hours, 7 shifts, 2 BnBs, 1 worker, 4 shifts with inventory issues.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin can login
Backend: Supervisor can login
Backend: Deployer can login
Backend: Admin can access analytics overview
Backend: Supervisor can access analytics overview
Backend: Deployer cannot access analytics overview (403)
Backend: Deployer cannot access daily-hours (403)
Backend: Overview returns correct structure (period, total_hours, total_shifts, active_bnbs, unique_workers)
Backend: Overview works with different date ranges (7, 14, 30, 90 days)
Backend: Daily hours returns array with date, total_hours, shift_count
Backend: BnB performance returns array with bnb_id, total_hours, total_shifts
Backend: Category breakdown returns array with category, total_hours, shift_count
Backend: Worker performance returns array with user_id, name, total_hours, shift_count
Backend: Inventory health returns total_shifts_with_issues and issues object (left_glove, right_glove, head_cam with wear/damaged counts)
Backend: Create end_shift event with analytics data
Frontend: Admin sees Analytics Dashboard nav link
Frontend: Analytics Dashboard page loads with header
Frontend: Date range selector with 2 date inputs
Frontend: 4/4 overview cards displayed (Total Hours, Shifts, BnBs, Workers)
Frontend: Daily Hours Captured chart displayed
Frontend: Hours by Category chart displayed
Frontend: Performance by BnB chart displayed
Frontend: Top Workers leaderboard displayed
Frontend: Inventory Health Issues chart displayed
Frontend: Date range dropdown has 4 options
Frontend: Deployer does NOT see Analytics Dashboard link
Frontend: Deployer redirected to dashboard when accessing /analytics

Date range selector works (Last 7/14/30/90 days + custom dates)
Overview cards show correct totals (Total Hours: 16, Total Shifts: 7, Active BnBs: 2, Active Workers: 1)
Daily Hours Captured area chart displays trend data
Hours by Category pie/donut chart shows category distribution (Cooking, Unspecified)
Performance by BnB horizontal bar chart shows per-BnB metrics (BNB-01, BNB-02)
